name: HuaAn S&P Global Oil Index LOF QDII
summary: HuaAn S&P Global Oil Index LOF QDII is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF) managed by HuaAn Funds that invests in the global oil market. It uses the QDII (Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor) scheme to invest in overseas markets and tracks the S&P Global Oil Index.
